category_sources: source_facts.description says Interactive computing in Python; official IPython docs say it provides a powerful interactive Python shell and Jupyter kernel.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and homepage capitalize the project as IPython; source_facts.name is ipython.
docs_sources: Official IPython documentation is hosted on Read the Docs; ipython.org documentation page points users there.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository describes itself as the official repository for IPython; official docs link to IPython's GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says interactive computing in Python; official docs describe the interactive Python shell, Jupyter kernel, magic commands, and rich display support.
